questionHtml:
Newton’s law of gravitation

A.     is equivalent to Newton’s second law of motion.

B.     explains the origin of gravitation.

C.     is used to make predictions.

D.     is not valid in a vacuum.

meta.title: Newton’s law of gravitation A. is equivalent to Newton’s second law of motion. B. explains the origin of gravitation. C. is used to make predictions. D. is not valid in a vacuum.
